message: fix(ci): use setup-edgebox action for proper Zig 0.15.2 setup

files.patch:
@@ -31,20 +31,8 @@ jobs:
         with:
           submodules: recursive
 
-      - name: Setup Zig
-        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
-        with:
-          version: 0.15.2
-
-      - name: Setup Bun
-        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
-        with:
-          bun-version: latest
-
-      - name: Setup Node.js
-        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
-        with:
-          node-version: '22'
+      - name: Setup EdgeBox
+        uses: ./.github/actions/setup-edgebox
 
       - name: Setup Go
         uses: actions/setup-go@v5
